raw_text: i want to tell all customers that if you are buying at night and so many products please check properly before making payment [ don't make payment before checking products] ... You cannot do anything if they tell 'we have checked cctv and we find no missing product' you can't do anything..... I have experienced this myself and I could not do anything about it. [ if guys have any suggestion please tell me]. 2 things happened with me 1) Delivered wrong items 2) Did not Delivery half of the product

I have given 1 star for no option for zero start. Worst App which shows the offers for dawaat rice. when I buy it unnecessary coupons are given. which shows me earlier buds, smart watch, air fryer, zomato voucher. After my order it gives me unnecessary coupons. what can I do with it.

I am order one laptop bag but that bag is not convenient so I return the back but my payment is not refund my product also loss my payment also loss I am waiting for my payment 3 months waiting but no use no customer care number to solve this problem only chatting option but they they don't our chats only they given the word to chats their own options only

My order showing delivered but I did not receive it, i called to delivery boy but his number found wrong...I tried 6 times to connect with customer support but they taking not seriously my issue... Totally waste of TIME & MONEY of customer... Highly disappointed... Very Bad Experience...

Received a brand-new fan with mismatched blades and motor colors, clearly indicating poor quality control. The real shock was Blinkit's customer service—they refused to provide any meaningful resolution despite clear evidence. Fast delivery is pointless if you deliver defective products and then abandon the customer. Absolutely unacceptable. I won't buy appliances from Blinkit again and wouldn't recommend anyone else to either.

disappointed, 2nd incident my hasband ordered items from his office, delivered order with missing item for amount 474, untill I notified them they shows delivered, if I didn't notify about missing item I would I have lost money and this is happened twice.

What exactly did I pay for—air? My order was marked delivered, but the package contained absolutely nothing. Not one item. This is the most ridiculous delivery experience I've ever had. Customers pay for products, not empty packages. Either your quality checks have completely failed or nobody cares what reaches the customer. Extremely disappointed, furious, and demanding an immediate refund. I want an immediate refund!

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. I received defective wireless earbuds with an extremely high volume issue, and even after reporting it, no proper support was provided. Instead of resolving the problem, I was simply asked to contact the brand myself. I purchased the product through Blinkit, so I expected customer support from their team. Poor after-sales service and no accountability for defective products. Definitely not the experience I expected. Would not recommend buying electron

They don't have a return option for the product I have purchased a headphones and did not like the sound quality. When I reached out the support they are just saying to reach out the product company site. Compared to this Instamart have the return for the products and they take responsibility for the delivered product if customer have any problem with the item. This blinkit is worst. I'll never use this again

I am extremely disappointed and frustrated with my recent experience with Blinkit. I ordered a phone charging cable expecting to receive the product as advertised on your platform. However, the item delivered to me is clearly a low-quality local product that does not match the description or quality promised at the time of purchase. The cable does not connect properly with my adapter or phone and fails to charge my device reliably. This makes the product practically useless and completely unfit

I just ordered some items on blinkit, amount deducted but it's showing still Awaiting Payment Status how much time it will take to confirm. If i need something right now what will I do later if I get it. Also a few days ago I ordered from blinkit, the amount was deducted and they were showing status Payment failed and it will be refunded in 2-3 days. After a few days it's showing money refunded but I didn't receive anything. Why you guys are doing such things...give me my money back.

If it was possible I would have given a 0 star rating but unfortunately this is the lowest I can give. I ordered a lighter from the app and they sent me a cheap quality one. when I contacted the delivery partner he said that he can't help me with it. I tried the customer support and it gave very mechanical and unhelpful answers. I pestered the delivery guy to let me talk to the manager of the store and he said that " there is no one there. I am not going to go chasing after them

blinkit is a big scam. I ordered peanut butter. I decided my product based on ingredients from pictures of product at blinkit app. when the product arrived i saw the ingredient list never matched the ingredient list from app of the same product they provided. the product i received was full of chemicals. this happened many times. now I have stopped ordering for a while. they only ask for review about color of the app. lol

First of all no one asked you to deliver within 10 minutes and second of all, when you're sending a damaged product, the concern for getting it returned is fast and that is okay but when it comes to refund and you want to interact with a support there's no helpline number to call, there's no proper chat agent to interact what should I possibly do with an AI bot? where I cannot even share my issue the worst possible support system ever. Better close this support system entirely.

I ordered an item, but it was never delivered even though the app marked it as delivered. I raised a complaint through the help section and spoke with customer support, but I still haven’t received any response or refund. The delivery person contacted me after accepting the order and asked me to cancel it from my side, which I did not do. Despite this, the order was later marked as delivered. Very disappointing service.

Overall , my experience with BLINKIT is Excellent. Fast Delivery and Neat Packaging with proper ordered items without damage makes this app more perfect and super convinent when I need something urgently. Items are delivered within minutes and sometimes before the given delivery time. This facility makes the customer very happy. I'm using BLINKIT from such a long time but they never gave any cause for complaint. Thanku BLINKIT for such facilities. 😊

Horrid experience. Delivery agent was so bad, he didn't call in the number that was provided in the receiver's number section. Kept calling me, I was unavailable and then cancelled my order. Didn't even receive the Rs 50 off welcome offer. Very very bad service. I couldn't reach any customer care support and all are bots. Highly inconvenient platform!!

Blinkit is a horrible company. They frequently show items as in stock, but after placing an order, they either don't deliver them or send only part of the order, claiming the items are actually out of stock. Customer support offers a refund that takes 2–3 days or a promo code that can't even be stacked with other offers. This keeps happening and shows poor inventory management and terrible customer service.

Absolutely horrible experience. My delivery was 26 minutes late, and all my frozen items arrived completely melted. They didn’t even bother to include a spoon or a straw. When I tried to complain, the customer service was a nightmare. They demanded I make a video showing the brand and expiry date of every single product one by one. ​To make it worse, their app is completely buggy. Even on a perfectly good network, the video took 30-40 minutes just to upload. After wasting all that time

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Fast, reliable, and a brand that does right by its riders Blinkit has become my go-to for quick grocery runs — the app is smooth, deliveries are fast, and the product range keeps growing. What I appreciate most: the delivery agents always show up properly geared (helmets, reflective jackets at night) and never seem to be riding recklessly or rushing dangerously to beat the clock.
